data.name: Llama 3 70B
data.description: 70B parameter model optimized for high-precision instruction following, deep reasoning, complex RAG pipelines, multi-step logic, and advanced code generation.

data.name: Llama 3 8B
data.description: 8B parameter low-latency model designed for high-throughput tasks, real-time chatbots, bulk classification, data extraction, and large-scale summarization.

data.name: Qwen 3 32B
data.description: 32B parameter multilingual model with strong coding capabilities, suited for translation, large document parsing, financial/legal analysis, and codebase reasoning.

data.name: GPT OSS 20B
data.description: 20B parameter aligned general-purpose model for conversational AI, creative writing, safe content generation, and dynamic agent-style interactions.
